raw_source_reread_reason: Parent batch already preserved the admitted-hash seam, the local contract mismatch, the terrain8 sign-pattern structure, the tokenization drift, and the next-family boundary.
reasons_for_candidate_status: Direct repo-top terrain8 admission survives while present local channelfamily SIM_ID admission does not.
Shared runner-hash provenance survives while the local and admitted output contracts remain structurally incompatible.
The admitted terrain8 sign-pattern packet is reusable without flattening it into the current local topology4-family result.
Exact output-hash continuity coexists with evidence-tokenization drift and therefore remains proposal-side.
reasons_for_quarantine: Exact repo-top admission is not treated as proof that the current runner still emits the admitted terrain8 surface.
Shared provenance is not treated as schema identity or current-output identity.
Terrain8 sign behavior is not backprojected into the current local topology4-family result.
Evidence-pack naming drift is not normalized away as if no contract drift exists.
The next topology4 channelgrid family remains outside this bounded seam batch.
